samples.xml_description:
<module id="adder_32bit">
    <description>Implement a module of a carry-lookahead 32-bit adder that uses the Carry-Lookahead Adder (CLA) architecture.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="A" width_description="[32:1]">32-bit input operand A.</input>
        <input id="B" width_description="[32:1]">32-bit input operand B.</input>
        <output id="S" width_description="[32:1]">32-bit output representing the sum of A and B.</output>
        <output id="C32">Carry-out output.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
    </parameter_description>
    <logic_description type="combinational_logic">
        <line>Deconstruct the operands into 16-bit operands: A_0, B_0, S_0.</line>
        <line>Each 16-bit operands are calculated using carry-lookahead adders.</line>
    </logic_description>
    <implementation>
        <line>Implement a carry-lookahead adder for the least significant 16 bits of the input operands.</line>
        <line>Implement a carry-lookahead adder for the most significant 16 bits of the input operands.</line>
        <line>Concatenate the results of the two previous adders to form the final result.</line>
    </implementation>
</module>
